questions.q: What is the difference between Hispanic and Latino as terms?
choices: They mean exactly the same thing
Hispanic applies only to Mexico; Latino applies to all Spanish speakers
Hispanic is older; Latino is more modern
Hispanic relates to Spain or Spanish language; Latino relates to Latin America or the Caribbean

questions.q: What was Cesar Chavez primarily known for advocating?
choices: Improving working and living conditions for agricultural workers

September 15 is significant because it's the anniversary of independence for which set of countries?

source.original_a: Costa Rica, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, and Nicaragua
source.notes: Costa Rica, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, and Nicaragua all gained independence from Spain on September 15, 1821.
